pages.text: The $(item)Large Ancient Skyseed$() — deepslate from a deep Rocky throw. A huge slab of the deep — diamonds and geodes.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.
A massive slab of the deep — moss over tuff and deepslate, with a far larger core than the standard Ancient isle and proportionally more to mine.

$(bold)The deep payoff$()$(br)The full deepslate ore suite in quantity — $(item)iron$(), $(item)copper$(), coal and redstone in big veins, diamond and emerald in the deep core — plus larger amethyst geodes and dripstone clusters.
$(bold)Throw deep$()$(br)Germinated low it skews toward diamond and emerald; the deep-dark variant brings sculk. Lantern up before it gets loud.
